behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, class/method/property names (Command<TParameters, TResult>, Parameters, ILogger, Log.CurrentContext, GetLogger<T>, GetLogger(Type), ILogContext.GetLogger, InternalsVisibleTo) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what needs to be accessible externally but doesn't prescribe exact modifier changes; agent must reason to change internal->public.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for 'public' modifier on specific declarations and removal of InternalsVisibleTo, which are the only reasonable ways to satisfy the requirements.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most f2p tests (test_command_class_is_public, test_parameters_record_is_public, test_ilogger_interface_is_public, test_log_current_context_is_public, etc.) are pure string-in-file checks; no compilation or behavioral execution of the changed accessibility.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p requires a specific source code change (adding 'public' modifier, removing InternalsVisibleTo) that a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All symptoms listed in instruction.md (Command, Parameters, ILogger, Log members, ILogContext methods, InternalsVisibleTo removal, format checks) are covered by tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with FAIL-TO-PASS and PASS-TO-PASS section comments and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is C# source code modifications, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers match the repo structure as shown in the gold patch.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files but the task is explicitly about accessibility of those files; localization isn't part of the challenge.
